rationale.R1.5: The agent suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty and provides detailed explanations for each issue identified.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential errors that could introduce downstream harm, such as incorrect convergence rates and notation issues.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
